raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, I authorized 2 documents to charge up to {$36000.00} to my XXXX XXXX account and up to {$14000.00} to my Costco Citi Visa account by XXXX XXXX for an event. XXXX made charges on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX for the maximum amount on each card account. On XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX charged my Costco Citi Visa account an additional {$10000.00} without my further authorization. The charge exceeded my available Visa charge limit of {$35000.00} for a total of {$41000.00}. On XX/XX/XXXX, I called Citibank but they would not accept my complaint. On XX/XX/XXXX, I again called Citibank to file a complaint and to have the charge removed from my account. In XXXX, I received a letter postmarked XX/XX/XXXX from Citibank Security Services which says : " We've completed our investigation and your dispute ( s ) is now closed ... Since you provided your account number to the merchant ( s ), we don't consider this fraudulent acitivity ... The charge ( s ) totaling {$10000.00} will remain on your account ... ''. I DISAGREE. On XX/XX/XXXX, Citibank withdrew by autopay {$5500.00} from my bank account as minimum payment due although I pay only $ XXXX  monthly by autopay on the closing payment due date, making my Visa account balance {$33000.00}.
